title: homalosorus pycnocarpos
intro: Homalosorus pycnocarpos, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of plant that can survive for long periods without water by drying out and then reviving when moisture becomes available. The medicinal properties of the resurrection fern include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of the plant are thought to include reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, which may help to protect against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of the resurrection fern include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water.
